import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{api,getAuthToken}from"../api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Home(){const[stats,setStats]=useState({shops:0,medicines:0});useEffect(()=>{const loadStats=async()=>{if(!getAuthToken()){return;}try{const[shopsRes,medicinesRes]=await Promise.all([api.get("/shops/"),api.get("/medicines/")]);const medicineCount=Array.isArray(medicinesRes.data)?medicinesRes.data.length:medicinesRes.data.count||0;setStats({shops:shopsRes.data.length,medicines:medicineCount});}catch(err){// Keep default stats if backend is unavailable.
